- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference

## Security Review Checklist (use with `/speckit.checklist security`)

> Mandatory for code touching: crypto, auth, webhooks, user input, external APIs

### Cryptographic Operations

- [ ] SEC001 No string comparison on secrets (use `crypto.timingSafeEqual`)
- [ ] SEC002 Signatures verified before payload processing
- [ ] SEC003 Keys/secrets from environment variables, never hardcoded

### Input Validation

- [ ] SEC004 All headers validated before use (presence + format)
- [ ] SEC005 Request body schema validation (Zod, Joi, JSON Schema)
- [ ] SEC006 Query params sanitized against injection

### Authentication/Authorization

- [ ] SEC007 Auth tokens have expiration
- [ ] SEC008 Failed auth attempts logged with rate limiting
- [ ] SEC009 Sensitive operations require re-authentication
